positive: Minimalist, abstract representation of a rising sun over stylized mountains. Focus on clean, geometric silhouettes in deep indigo and warm gold tones. The foreground features simplified, layered geometric mountain peaks with strong contrast against a vibrant gradient sky transitioning from dawn lavender to bright saffron. Utilize negative space effectively, creating a bold, graphic composition suitable for textile printing. The style should be clean vector art, highly defined outlines, and flat color blocking, giving a modern, ethereal, yet solid aesthetic. Central composition, high detail, sharp edges, graphic novel quality.
negative: blurry, realistic photography, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, bokeh, excessive detail, gradients (where outlines are needed)
